_comment: Local meeting note-taker config. Copy this to config.json and fill in the paths for your machine. Per-machine sections are keyed by platform (wsl | macos | windows, per .agent/scripts/detect_platform.sh). Engine chain: auto = whispercpp (local GPU, skipped if the probe fails) -> cli (Gemini API, audio-in, speaker labels). It never falls back to CPU whisper; engine=cpu only when you set it explicitly.
_draft_note: MOM draft model, routed through the agy-bridge draft chain. Leave draft_model empty to use the default chain, or name a specific model your agy-bridge is configured for.

wsl._note: WSL is the pipeline host when capture runs on the Windows side (recorder.py under Windows Python). If whisper.cpp runs Windows-side, point whispercpp_bin at the .exe via a /mnt/c path; otherwise leave both empty and the engine chain falls through to cli (Gemini).

macos._note: Apple Silicon: `brew install whisper-cpp` (Metal GPU is automatic). For system audio, install a loopback device such as BlackHole and set avfoundation_audio_device to its index from `recorder.py --list-devices`.

windows._note: Capture only (recorder.py with Windows Python + pyaudiowpatch). The processing pipeline runs in WSL or on macOS/Linux.
